description: Hand-polished gold Hearted reads in the redesigned { read } shape (ConceptReadSchema: image, lens, tension, take, contradiction, arc, lines, texture). The bar the pairwise judge measures candidates against (gold-vs-candidate). First 4 promoted from concept-data.ts in Session 5; dashes normalized to the no-dash voice rule. Expanded in Session 5.5-continued with 5 reads chosen to span lyric variance the original 4 missed: foreign-language with parenthetical glosses (DtMF), short surface-true chant (No Sex for Ben), monochrome deep dread (Beautiful Things), two-act narrative journey (Pink Pony Club), tempo-vs-emotion gap (As It Was). Keyed by spotifyTrackId so they match experiment runs regardless of label formatting; the 4 new non-DtMF entries use a stable slug join-key (no real Spotify ID needed for judging — backfill the real ID in both this file and regen.ts SONGS if ever wanted). Edit the prose freely; it defines 'reads like Hearted'.

entries.song: The Rapture — No Sex for Ben
